---
title: "Conference Abstracts"
format: html
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(yaml)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

abstracts <- yaml::read_yaml("data/abstracts.yml") |> bind_rows()

# ---- Force required columns to exist ----
required_cols <- c("pdf", "link", "city", "state", "type", "award")

for (col in required_cols) {
  if (!col %in% names(abstracts)) {
    abstracts[[col]] <- NA_character_
  }
}

abstracts <- abstracts |>
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    year = year(date)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(date))


badge_html <- function(scope) {
  
  if (is.na(scope)) return("")
  
  color <- switch(
    scope,
    international = "#8e44ad",
    national = "#2980b9",
    regional = "#27ae60",
    local = "#7f8c8d",
    "#bdc3c7"
  )
  
  paste0(
    "<span class='location-badge' style='background:", color, ";'>",
    toupper(scope),
    "</span>"
  )
}


```

```{r, include=FALSE}
render_section <- function(data, section_title) {
  
  
  cat("## ", section_title, "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    cat("_No entries._\n\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  
  data <- data |> arrange(desc(date))
  
  for (yr in unique(data$year)) {
    
    cat("### ", yr, "\n\n", sep = "")
    
    subset <- data |> filter(year == yr)
    
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(subset))) {
      
      row <- subset[i, ]
      
      # Location
      location <- if (!is.na(row$city)) {
        paste0(row$city, ", ", row$state)
      } else {
        "Location not specified"
      }
      
      # PDF link
      pdf_text <- if (!is.na(row$pdf)) {
        paste0("[File](", row$pdf, ")")
      } else "File"
      
      # External link
      link_text <- if (!is.na(row$link)) {
        paste0(" | [Link](", row$link, ")")
      } else " | Link"
      
      # Award text
      award_text <- if (!is.na(row$award)) {
        paste0("  \n**Award:** ", row$award)
      } else ""
      
      #Badge
      scope_badge <- badge_html(row$scope)
      
      
      cat( 
        scope_badge, 
        "\n\n", 
        "**", 
        row$meeting, 
        "**  \n\"", 
        row$title, 
        "\"  \n", 
        location, "  \n",
        pdf_text, 
        link_text, 
        award_text, 
        "  \n  \n", 
        sep = "" )
    }
  }
}
```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section(
  abstracts |> filter(type == "oral"),
  "Oral Presentations"
)
```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section(
  abstracts |> filter(type == "poster"),
  "Poster Presentations"
)
```
